Search Eureka

Static handoff for Eureka public search. The local/prototype runtime exists, but hosted public search is not configured or verified.

Overview Search Status Snapshot Source Matrix Eval And Audit Status Demo Queries Limitations And Public-Alpha Boundaries Live-Alpha Preparation Roadmap Local Quickstart
Public Search Static Handoff v0 is implemented as static publication only. This page does not make hosted search live and does not add backend hosting.

Hosted Search Status

Hosted public search is not configured. This static page is a handoff surface only. GitHub Pages serves files from site/dist; it does not run the Python public search runtime.

Static Search Handoff

The first allowed runtime mode is local_index_only. The static handoff keeps live probes, downloads, installs, uploads, accounts, arbitrary URL fetch, local path search, and telemetry disabled.

Use The Local Runtime

From a checkout, validate the public-alpha wrapper and start the local workbench. The commands are local-only and do not deploy Eureka.

python scripts/run_hosted_public_search.py --check-config
python scripts/run_hosted_public_search.py --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8080

Then open http://127.0.0.1:8080/search?q=windows+7+apps or http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/v1/search?q=windows+7+apps.

Try These Queries Locally

  • windows 7 apps
  • latest firefox before xp support ended
  • driver.inf
  • thinkpad t42 wifi windows 2000
  • pc magazine ray tracing

Static Alternatives

  • Static resolver demos
  • Lite search handoff
  • Text search handoff
  • Files search handoff note
  • Search handoff data
  • Search configuration data
  • Public index summary data

Boundaries

  • No hosted backend is configured or verified by this page.
  • No live probes, scraping, crawling, arbitrary URL fetch, downloads, installs, uploads, accounts, local path search, or telemetry are enabled.
  • Public search remains local/prototype until a later rehearsal and operator approval.

Published Capability Data

The static handoff publishes data/search_handoff.json, data/search_config.json, and data/public_index_summary.json so old clients, static readers, and future rehearsal tooling can tell that hosted search is unavailable, local runtime instructions exist, local_index_only is the first mode, the controlled public index exists, and unsafe behavior remains disabled.

  • Static site does not run Python.
  • Hosted backend status is unavailable or unverified unless future evidence says otherwise.
  • The local runtime uses server-owned local index records and rejects caller-provided local paths or URLs.
  • No live probes, downloads, installs, uploads, accounts, local path search, telemetry, arbitrary URL fetch, scraping, or crawling are enabled; API stability remains pre-production.
  • Public Search Rehearsal v0 records local safe-query and blocked-request evidence; hosted public search remains future work.
Eureka is a Python reference backend prototype, not production. This site uses no scraping, performs no live source probes, and makes no external search calls. external baselines pending/manual; source placeholders remain placeholders.
